calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Release Undertaking By Kargaroo Logistics Llc And Lance Jensen
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

APPELLANTs KARGAROO LOGISTICS, LLC.'s,and LANCE JENSEN's Motion To Release Undertaking By Kargaroo Logistics Llc And Lance Jensen.

Defendants/Appellants Kargaroo Logistics, LLC and Lance Jensen's unopposed Motion To Release Undertaking is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court orders released the cash bond of Seventy-Three Thousand Three Hundred Twenty-One Dollars and Sixty-Eight Cents ($73,321.68) posted by Defendants/Appellants in this matter, with accrued interest per statute. The court orders the full amount of funds disbursed by check to Multi Air Freight, Inc.; c/o/ Lance Jensen; 99-D South Hill Drive; Brisbane, CA 94005.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2025 Vacated
